subtopicsString: The Interface and Workspace Customization, Understanding the Layers Panel, Basic Transformation and Alignment Tools, Creating and Saving Documents for Different Media, Geometric and Freehand Selection Tools, Quick Selection and Magic Wand Techniques, Non-Destructive Editing with Layer Masks, The Select and Mask Workspace, Spot Healing and Patch Tools, The Clone Stamp and Pattern Stamp, Content-Aware Fill and Scale, Using the Liquify Filter for Facial Features, Levels and Curves for Tonal Control, Hue, Saturation, and Vibrance Adjustments, Working with Adjustment Layers, Introduction to the Camera Raw Filter, The Pen Tool and Vector Shapes, Typography and Text Formatting, Applying Layer Styles and Blending Options, Smart Objects and Smart Filters
